name: Pudding in a Clour
recipeIngredient: 1 package (4 serving size) Jello instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon whipped topping evenly into 6 dessert dishes.
2. Using the back of a spoon, spread the whipped topping onto the bottom and sides of each dish.
3. Pour milk into a medium bowl.
4. Add the Jello instant pudding mix to the milk and stir until combined.
5. Beat the mixture with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
6. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
7. Spoon the pudding mixture into the center of the whipped topping.
8. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes 6 servings. From the Favorite Brand Name Recipes Cookbook, Celebrating 100 Years. From the database of Beth Lane.
